angle_name: AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) - Brand Story
layout_name: Swiss Grid (Asymmetric left-aligned text layout, minimal background)

displayText.headline: Design That Speaks Before You Do

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Swiss Grid design
data.description: Creative concept detail: Swiss Grid visual layout style. Beautifully organized asymmetric left-aligned text lines on a pristine, crisp white backdrop. A premium three-seater sofa aligns perfectly with the clean architectural grid lines, maximizing negative space and giving an ultra-clean editorial feel.

angle_name: PAS (Problem, Agitate, Solution) - Core Pain Point
layout_name: Marble Pedestal (Centered text, products balanced on a white marble platform)

displayText.headline: Sinking Cushion Fatigue?
displayText.subheading: Say goodbye to sagging sofa frames
displayText.footer: Trade in your old furniture for value.

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Marble Pedestal style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Marble Pedestal visual layout style. A luxurious white marble platform rests in the center of the frame, elevating the detailed bed frame. Text is perfectly centered above the product, creating a classical architectural focal point that screams stability.

layout_name: Linear Gradient Float (Glow effects, products suspended mid-air with soft shadows)

displayText.headline: From Blank Space to Luxury Sanctuary

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Linear Gradient Float style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Linear Gradient Float visual layout style. The premium leather sofa is suspended mid-air against a warm, glowing amber-to-slate gradient background. Soft realistic drop shadows create a dreamlike, weightless feel of unmatched comfort.

layout_name: Diagonal Split-Screen (Two-tone background dividing text and product zones)

displayText.headline: Trusted by 10 Million Indian Homes
displayText.footer: Visit showrooms in Noida, Ghitorni & Gurgaon.

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Diagonal Split-Screen style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Diagonal Split-Screen visual layout style. A sharp, dynamic diagonal line splits the canvas. The left side is a solid Slate Gray holding trust metrics and bold gold typography; the right side showcases the pristine marble top dining set in action.

layout_name: Studio Reflective (Deep charcoal background, products placed on reflective black glass)

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Studio Reflective style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Studio Reflective visual layout style. Placed in a dark moody studio setting, the deep charcoal backdrop reflects a crisp overhead studio light. The sofa rests on a highly reflective black glass floor, giving a flawless mirrored reflection beneath the structural legs.

layout_name: Botanical Minimalist (Overcast natural daylight, soft leaf shadows on concrete walls)

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Botanical Minimalist style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Botanical Minimalist visual layout style. Soft overcast natural daylight streams into a raw concrete room. Warm tropical leaf shadows drape delicately across the concrete wall behind the innovative hydraulic storage bed, framing the scene with natural life.

layout_name: Monolith Frame (Large geometric backing blocks behind the main product)

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Monolith Frame style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Monolith Frame visual layout style. Behind the elegant sofa rises a magnificent geometric block structure in warm beige and deep taupe, framing the product like a museum sculpture. Bold, luxury-editorial typography commands interest.

layout_name: Warm Editorial (Beige paper textures, classic serif margins, clinical markers)

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Warm Editorial style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Warm Editorial visual layout style. Textured warm beige paper backdrop with classic, elegant serif margins. Technical design pointers elegantly trace details of the premium sofa cushion, mapping out comfort density points.

layout_name: High-Contrast Spotlight (Dramatic low-key spotlight beam highlighting the product)

displayText.headline: A Warm Welcome Starts Here
displayText.footer: Visit us in Ghitorni, Noida, Faridabad & Gurgaon.

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern High-Contrast Spotlight style
data.description: Creative concept detail: High-Contrast Spotlight visual layout style. A dark low-key backdrop holds a highly concentrated, dramatic ray of spotlight beaming directly onto the elegant dining table, accenting its rich marble patterns and gleaming metallic chairs.

layout_name: Minimal Collage (Overlaying multiple product angles, staggered offsets)

displayText.headline: Furniture Built for Generations
displayText.footer: Trusted by generations. Made with love.

data.style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Minimal Collage style
data.description: Creative concept detail: Minimal Collage visual layout style. Staggered overlapping boxes showcase different macro textures of the wood grain, soft leather close-ups, and the final sofa set. Sophisticated architectural crop marks frame the beautiful layout elements.
